focus_node: Phase 11.1 complete: text-similarity.sh with n-gram comparison, caching, and graceful fallback

query_summary.intent: Complete Phase 11.1: text-similarity.sh for syndication detection via n-gram comparison
key_findings: text-similarity.sh supports pairwise and scan-all modes
Jaccard similarity on 3-grams: high (>70%), moderate (50-70%), low (<50%) thresholds
Caching in tracking/similarity_cache.json for O(1) lookup after first run
Graceful fallback on all errors: missing files, empty input, etc.

next_steps_todo.task: Phase 11.2: Agent prompt for causal chain analysis (X wrote first, Y copied)
Consider Phase 12: Contextual split & assumption chain (future)
